title: speed
description: change bpm speed over amount of beats

messages.description: <f,f> — target, number of beats; <f,f,f> — start, target, number of beats

methods.description: floats/lists precede by 'set' waits for a bang to trigger
triggers the object after a 'set' message

body: [speed] is somewhat related to [line]. You give it a target bpm value and an amount of time in beats to reach it (speeding up or down). Then, the overall tempo in ms is output (via the right outlet) and bpm values are given for each beat until it reaches the target (left outlet), which correctly emulates an accelerando or ritardando.
